package rulecoverage

func NegativeHttpServerBootstrapWithoutGracefulShutdownFlow() string {
    ruleID := "http_server_bootstrap_without_graceful_shutdown_flow"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "HTTP server startup paths that lack visible signal handling and Shutdown ownership for graceful shutdown."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
